name: hy-mt1.5
readme_html:
Imported from hf.co/mradermacher/HY-MT1.5-1.8B-GGUF with corrected template.

$ ollama run frob/hy-mt1.5 "Translate the following segment into Greek, without additional explanation.\nThe quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog."
Ο γρήγορος καφέ αλόυρος πηδάει πάνω από τον κουβερτικό σκύλο.
